productDisplayName: Timberland Men Jeunes Grey Casual Shoes
description: Dress your growing up kids in absolute comfort in the timberland Hypertrail Gore-Tex Oxford and watch them enjoy in stylish comfort. Designed with a nubuck, suede and mesh upper, this shoe is sure to keep your young one's feet fresh and comfortable all day long.UpperSuede and nubuck upper engineered with Gore-Tex for waterproofing, breathable comfort and styleSynthetic leather toe cap and heel cap for enhanced durabilityGore-Tex meshed and padded tongue and collar for snug, breathable comfortFabric inner lining for all-day comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitPadded foam footbed with a fabric lining for sweat-free, all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable non-marking rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs throughout for absolute grip and tractionCurved midfoot for inner arch supportShoe careWipe dust with a dry, clean clothUse a nubuck and suede brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
